answer: SendGrid no longer offers a permanent free tier for developer API access [1][2]. As of May 27, 2025, the previous free plan was replaced with a one-time 60-day free trial for new accounts [3][1][4]. During this 60-day period, you can use the Email API to send up to 100 emails per day [3][5]. Once the trial expires, you must upgrade to a paid plan to continue sending emails or accessing API features [3][1]. Paid plans for the Email API are self-serve and start at $19.95 per month [6][7][2].
